docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KOVALEVSKAYA, ANNA
(SC-290) ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, CHESTER AS TO DEFENDANT KOVALEVSKAYA, ANNA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2015 BY QUEENA HO. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER ALONA GRINBERG. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE: QUEENA HO. FILED BY LIM, CHESTER KOVALEVSKAYA, ANNA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIM, CHESTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOVALEVSKAYA, ANNA $932.77 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $977.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, CHESTER AS TO DEFENDANT KOVALEVSKAYA, ANNA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-10-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOVALEVSKAYA, ANNA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $932.77 FILED BY LIM, CHESTER AS TO DEFENDANT KOVALEVSKAYA, ANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
